case_title: REINA CASTRO JARAMILLO VS. VICTOR MEJIA ARREOLA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$AMOUNT NOT GIVEN) SERVED SEP-02-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MEJIA ARREOLA, VICTOR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CASTRO JARAMILLO, REINA AS TO DEFENDANT MEJIA ARREOLA, VICTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO DISMISS COMPLAINT WITH PREJUDICE. FILED BY DEFENDANT MEJIA ARREOLA, VICTOR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF REIN CASTRO JARAMILLO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. DEFENDANT VICTOR MEJIA ARREOLA IS PRESENT. THE COURT FINDS THAT DUE TO PENDING CRIMINAL INVESTIGATION IN THIS MATTER IT HAS NO JURISDICTION AND THEREFORE DISMISSES THIS CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
